svg.text: MARLIE 1 — LAFAYETTE AI FACTORY & COMMAND CENTER
FLOOR PLANS | 24' x 40' | 2 FLOORS | 24 NVL72 RACKS | 1152 GPUs | 2.2 MW IT LOAD
Sheet A-001 | Design Intent | Scale: Conceptual | 2026-04-02 | NOT FOR CONSTRUCTION
12 NVL72 RACKS | 8 COMPUTE + 2 NETWORK + 2 STORAGE | 1120 kW
EATON BEAM RUBIN DSX + ABB SACE Infinitus
12 NVL72 RACKS | 8 COMPUTE + 2 NETWORK + 2 STORAGE | 1120 kW
EATON BEAM RUBIN DSX + ABB SACE Infinitus
300 kW SOLAR — First Solar Series 7 TR1 (550W)
Networking Rack (QX800 IB / SX Ethernet) — 20 kW
Footprint: 24' x 40' = 960 sq ft/floor, 1,920 sq ft total
Usable per floor: 24' x 37' = 888 sq ft (3' staircase at south end)
Racks per floor: 12 (8 compute + 2 networking + 2 storage)
Total racks: 24 across 2 floors (2 full SuperPODs)
IT Load: 2,240 kW (2.2 MW) — est. 2.7 MW with cooling overhead
Rack layout: center-mounted single row, 11' aisles each side (shipping container concept)
CDU zone: 3' at north end | Elec panel: 3' at south end
1. Building footprint: 24' x 40' = 960 sq ft per floor, 1,920 sq ft total.
2. Staircase: 24' wide x 3' deep at south end. Usable space: 24' x 37' per floor.
3. Center-mounted single rack row (shipping container concept): 4' deep racks centered, 10' access aisles each side.
4. 12 rack positions per floor: 3' CDU zone (N) + 31' rack zone + 3' elec panel (S) = 37' usable.
5. Each floor: 8 compute NVL72 (230 kW ea, liquid cooled) + 2 networking (Quantum-X800 IB + Spectrum-X) + 2 storage (NVMe).
6. 2 complete SuperPODs: System 1 (Floor 1) + System 2 (Floor 2). Each independently cooled and powered.
7. NVL72 rack: ~2' wide x 4' deep x 6.5' tall, 230 kW, 45C hot water, ~2,500 lbs loaded.
8. Floor loading: NVL72 ~250 lb/sq ft concentrated — structural reinforcement at all rack positions required.
9. 800V DC power via Eaton Beam Rubin DSX + ORV3 Sidecar, ABB SACE Infinitus DC protection, overhead busway to each rack.
10. CoolIT CHx200 (200 kW) CDU connections at north wall, Staubli UQD quick-disconnects, BAC TrilliumSeries outside.
11. Total: 24 racks, 1152 GPUs, 2.2 MW IT, est. 2.7 MW total with cooling.
MARLIE 1 = 1,920 sq ft / 24 racks / 1152 GPUs | Trappeys = 112,500 sq ft / 36-84 racks / scalable SuperPOD deployment
